text:
やっぱ、ヴォル・ドラゴンは
迫力あるねー、でもあなたも
負けてなかったよ。

しかもなんだかノリノリに
見えたけど？　どう、どう？
バレットボウにはまってきた？

あなたをそんなにしちゃったからには
わたしも難しい訓練用メニューを
考えとかないとなー。

今から楽しみでしょ？
またおいでー

Vol Dragons are really something else, aren't
they? But you held your own against it just the
same.

I'd say you even looked like you were having
fun out there. Well? Were ya? Fancy yourself
a bow-master yet?

Well now that I've got you nocked on bows as
a whole, I better fix up some even harder
training for ya.

Wouldn't want you getting bored, right?
Be sure to drop by again.
